text.text:
*NEW SLIDE TYPES SIGNALS — 4–10 MAY 2026*

*🔸 Trajectory:*
— Pin on Image: 212 users (WoW +15%), 320 times. 4wk: ➖ flat.
— Idea Board: 322 users (WoW +65%), 663 times. 4wk: 📈 growing.
— Ranking: 345 users (WoW +12%), 568 times. 4wk: 📉 fading.

*🔸 Repeat-use (slides per user, this week):*
— Pin on Image: 1.5
— Idea Board: 2.1
— Ranking: 1.6
— Range across non-quiz interactive slides: 1.5–2.7

*🔸 Adoption rank (by unique users):*
— Among non-quiz interactive slides: Pin on Image #8, Idea Board #6, Ranking #4
— Among all slide types: Pin on Image #22, Idea Board #18, Ranking #16

*🔸 Notable:*
— Idea Board is the standout: +65% WoW users, climbed from #8 to #6 among non-quiz interactive (overtaking Brainstorm and Q&A) and from #22 to #18 across all slide types.
— Ranking still down from its W17 peak (479 → 345 users) despite a small WoW bounce; 4-week trend remains negative.
— Pin on Image has the lowest repeat-use of any non-quiz interactive slide (1.5 vs top of 2.7) — users try it but don’t come back for more.

<https://eu.mixpanel.com/project/2668743/view/3205947/app/boards#id=11071959|Dashboard>

blocks.alt_text: Weekly unique users — new slide types vs interactive-slide range
